meta.title: Wreath Making in Calgary | Mixler
meta.description: Make your own wreath at a Calgary workshop. Choose your greens, blooms, and accents, then build something beautiful for your front door. All materials included.

content.subtitle: Make a seasonal wreath that you'll actually want to hang on your door.
content.intro: Wreath making workshops in Calgary bring people together around one of the most satisfying creative projects you can finish in a single evening. You work with real greenery, dried flowers, ribbon, and seasonal accents. The process is part floral design, part craft, and the result is something that looks store-bought but is completely your own.

what_to_expect.heading: Fresh and dried materials
what_to_expect.body: Workshops use a mix of fresh greenery, dried florals, and seasonal accents depending on the time of year.

what_to_expect.heading: Wire frame and technique
what_to_expect.body: You'll learn how to secure materials to a wire frame using floral wire and picks. It's easier than it looks.

what_to_expect.heading: Finishing touches
what_to_expect.body: Ribbon, picks, and decorative elements are added last. This is where your wreath really takes on its personality.

what_to_expect.heading: Ready to hang
what_to_expect.body: Your wreath goes straight on your door. Most last weeks to months depending on the materials used.

tips: Secure each bundle of greenery firmly before adding the next. Loose materials shift over time.
Work in one direction around the frame for a consistent, full look.
Calgary's seasons make wreath making especially popular in fall and winter. Seasonal workshops sell out fast.
This is a great group activity. A table of friends making wreaths together is a genuinely good evening.
Mixler tracks wreath making events in Calgary. Join the waitlist and we'll let you know as soon as one is added.
content.waitlist_heading: Want to know when we run wreath making events?
content.waitlist_body: Join the waitlist and we'll email you when we add one. We use this to plan what to run next.

faq.q: Do I need any crafting experience?
faq.a: No experience needed. The instructor guides you through every step, from attaching greenery to adding the final ribbon.

faq.q: What season is wreath making most popular?
faq.a: Fall and winter are the most popular times, but workshops happen year-round with seasonal materials.

faq.q: How long does a wreath making workshop take?
faq.a: Most sessions are 2 to 3 hours. You'll have a completed wreath ready to hang by the end.
Yes. You choose your colour palette, ribbon, and accents. No two wreaths from the same workshop ever look alike.
